requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (PNS IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（PNS IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（PNS IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires in the Philippines is assessed using the Philippine National Standard adoption of IEC 62471 (PNS IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which classifies products into risk groups from RG0 (Exempt, no hazard) to RG3 (High risk) based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance. Where photobiological safety is within the scope of the lighting technical regulation, a risk-group assessment supports the BPS ICC / PS technical file, and RG2 / RG3 products carry usage restrictions and warning requirements. The classification is part of the broader product safety demonstration alongside the general luminaire safety standard (PNS IEC 60598) and self-ballasted lamp standard (PNS IEC 62560). Testing should be referenced to the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz operating condition.
summary.zh: 菲律宾 LED 灯及灯具的光生物安全采用将 IEC 62471 采用为菲律宾国家标准（PNS IEC 62471——灯和灯系统的光生物安全）进行评估，依据蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度将产品分为从 RG0（豁免，无危害）至 RG3（高危险）的危险组别。在光生物安全属于照明技术法规适用范围时，危险组别评估支持 BPS ICC / PS 技术文件，RG2 / RG3 产品须附带使用限制及警告要求。该分类是与通用灯具安全标准（PNS IEC 60598）及自镇流灯标准（PNS IEC 62560）并行的更广泛产品安全证明的组成部分。检测应参照菲律宾 230 V 60 Hz 运行条件。
summary.zht: 菲律賓 LED 燈及燈具的光生物安全採用將 IEC 62471 採用為菲律賓國家標準（PNS IEC 62471——燈和燈系統的光生物安全）進行評估，依據藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度將產品分為從 RG0（豁免，無危害）至 RG3（高危險）的危險組別。在光生物安全屬於照明技術法規適用範圍時，危險組別評估支持 BPS ICC / PS 技術文件，RG2 / RG3 產品須附帶使用限制及警告要求。該分類是與通用燈具安全標準（PNS IEC 60598）及自鎮流燈標準（PNS IEC 62560）並行的更廣泛產品安全證明的組成部分。檢測應參照菲律賓 230 V 60 Hz 運行條件。

standards_or_laws: PNS IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk group classification, as adopted by BPS)
BPS conformity scheme (ICC / PS) under the lighting technical regulation — photobiological safety within scope where mandated

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement for residential luminaires is less prescriptive. Both PNS IEC 62471 and GB/T 20145 share the IEC 62471 technical base, so risk-group classification methods are aligned, but China test reports are not automatically accepted in the Philippine BPS conformity file.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；对居民灯具的执行规定不够严格。PNS IEC 62471 与 GB/T 20145 同以 IEC 62471 为技术基础，危险组别分类方法一致，但中国检测报告不会被菲律宾 BPS 合格评定文件自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；對居民燈具的執行規定不夠嚴格。PNS IEC 62471 與 GB/T 20145 同以 IEC 62471 為技術基礎，危險組別分類方法一致，但中國檢測報告不會被菲律賓 BPS 合格評定文件自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 62471:2006)

gap.en: Both markets use the IEC 62471 risk-group method, so the technical classification is broadly comparable. The gaps are procedural and enforcement-related: (1) where photobiological safety is in scope of the Philippine lighting technical regulation, the risk-group assessment must support the BPS ICC / PS file, and the report should come from a BPS-recognised (ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025) laboratory — China GB/T 20145 reports are not automatically accepted; (2) GB/T 20145 is recommended-only in China and may not have been tested for a China-spec product, so a Philippine-bound product may need a fresh RG assessment; (3) RG2 / RG3 products require warning labels and usage instructions in the Philippine file. Most general LED luminaires fall in RG0 or RG1, but the classification must still be documented to support market access.
gap.zh: 两个市场均采用 IEC 62471 危险组别方法，技术分类基本可比。差距主要为程序及执行层面：（1）在光生物安全属于菲律宾照明技术法规适用范围时，危险组别评估须支持 BPS ICC / PS 文件，报告应来自 BPS 认可（ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025）实验室——中国 GB/T 20145 报告不会被自动接受；（2）GB/T 20145 在中国仅为推荐性标准，中国规格产品可能未经检测，因此面向菲律宾的产品可能须重新进行危险组别评估；（3）RG2 / RG3 产品须在菲律宾文件中附带警告标签及使用说明。大多数通用 LED 灯具属于 RG0 或 RG1，但分类结果仍须记录以支持市场准入。
gap.zht: 兩個市場均採用 IEC 62471 危險組別方法，技術分類基本可比。差距主要為程序及執行層面：（1）在光生物安全屬於菲律賓照明技術法規適用範圍時，危險組別評估須支持 BPS ICC / PS 文件，報告應來自 BPS 認可（ILAC MRA / ISO IEC 17025）實驗室——中國 GB/T 20145 報告不會被自動接受；（2）GB/T 20145 在中國僅為推薦性標準，中國規格產品可能未經檢測，因此面向菲律賓的產品可能須重新進行危險組別評估；（3）RG2 / RG3 產品須在菲律賓文件中附帶警告標籤及使用說明。大多數通用 LED 燈具屬於 RG0 或 RG1，但分類結果仍須記錄以支持市場准入。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / within ICC-PS scope — photobiological risk-group classification per PNS IEC 62471 supports the BPS conformity file where in scope; RG2 / RG3 products require warnings and usage restrictions
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry (DTI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk-group classification in the Philippines uses PNS IEC 62471 and supports the BPS ICC / PS technical file where photobiological safety is in scope for the product type. The method is broadly comparable to China GB/T 20145 (both IEC 62471-based), but GB/T 20145 is recommended-only in China and its reports are not automatically accepted by BPS, so a fresh risk-group assessment from a BPS-recognised laboratory may be needed. Document the risk group; RG2 / RG3 products require warning labelling and usage restrictions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾光生物危险组别分类采用 PNS IEC 62471，在光生物安全属于产品适用范围时支持 BPS ICC / PS 技术文件。该方法与中国 GB/T 20145（均基于 IEC 62471）基本可比，但 GB/T 20145 在中国仅为推荐性标准且其报告不会被 BPS 自动接受，因此可能须由 BPS 认可实验室重新进行危险组别评估。请记录危险组别；RG2 / RG3 产品须附带警告标签及使用限制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓光生物危險組別分類採用 PNS IEC 62471，在光生物安全屬於產品適用範圍時支持 BPS ICC / PS 技術文件。該方法與中國 GB/T 20145（均基於 IEC 62471）基本可比，但 GB/T 20145 在中國僅為推薦性標準且其報告不會被 BPS 自動接受，因此可能須由 BPS 認可實驗室重新進行危險組別評估。請記錄危險組別；RG2 / RG3 產品須附帶警告標籤及使用限制。

requirement_topic.en: Risk-Group Marking and Consumer Warnings on Label vs China Practice
requirement_topic.zh: 标签上的危险组别标识及消费者警告 vs 中国做法
requirement_topic.zht: 標籤上的危險組別標識及消費者警告 vs 中國做法

summary.en: Where a luminaire is classified RG2 (Moderate risk) or above under PNS IEC 62471, the Philippine conformity framework expects the risk group and an appropriate caution / warning to be communicated to the user, typically on the product, packaging, or instruction sheet (for example a do-not-stare caution for RG2 sources). The general product safety standards (PNS IEC 60598 for luminaires, PNS IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps) also carry marking and instruction requirements that the product must satisfy for BPS ICC / PS clearance. Unlike the EU, the Philippines does not mandate a blue-light-hazard class on a standardised energy label; the warning is delivered through product safety marking and instructions rather than a labelling-regulation field. Markings and instructions for the Philippine market are expected in line with local language and regulatory practice.
summary.zh: 在灯具依据 PNS IEC 62471 被分类为 RG2（中等危险）或更高时，菲律宾合格评定框架要求向用户传达危险组别及适当的注意/警告，通常标注在产品、包装或说明书上（如对 RG2 光源的「请勿凝视」注意事项）。通用产品安全标准（灯具适用 PNS IEC 60598、自镇流 LED 灯适用 PNS IEC 62560）亦含产品须满足的标识及说明要求，以取得 BPS ICC / PS 清关。与欧盟不同，菲律宾不强制在标准化能效标签上标注蓝光危害等级；该警告通过产品安全标识及说明传达，而非通过标签法规字段。面向菲律宾市场的标识及说明应符合当地语言及监管惯例。
summary.zht: 在燈具依據 PNS IEC 62471 被分類為 RG2（中等危險）或更高時，菲律賓合格評定框架要求向用戶傳達危險組別及適當的注意/警告，通常標註在產品、包裝或說明書上（如對 RG2 光源的「請勿凝視」注意事項）。通用產品安全標準（燈具適用 PNS IEC 60598、自鎮流 LED 燈適用 PNS IEC 62560）亦含產品須滿足的標識及說明要求，以取得 BPS ICC / PS 清關。與歐盟不同，菲律賓不強制在標準化能效標籤上標註藍光危害等級；該警告通過產品安全標識及說明傳達，而非通過標籤法規字段。面向菲律賓市場的標識及說明應符合當地語言及監管慣例。

standards_or_laws: PNS IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (risk-group caution / marking guidance)
PNS IEC 60598-1 / PNS IEC 62560 — luminaire and self-ballasted lamp marking and instruction requirements (as adopted by BPS)

summary.en: China's GB 30255 / China Energy Label does not include a blue-light-hazard class, and GB/T 20145 (recommended) does not impose a mandatory consumer-facing risk-group warning for general residential LED luminaires. China product safety marking under GB/T 7000.1 covers general luminaire markings (ratings, symbols, manufacturer information) but does not mandate a photobiological caution label for typical RG0 / RG1 products. There is no China requirement equivalent to a standardised blue-light class on a label.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 30255 / 中国能效标识不含蓝光危害等级，GB/T 20145（推荐性）未对通用居民 LED 灯具规定强制性面向消费者的危险组别警告。中国 GB/T 7000.1 下的产品安全标识涵盖通用灯具标识（额定值、符号、制造商信息），但未对典型 RG0 / RG1 产品强制要求光生物注意标签。中国无相当于在标签上标注标准化蓝光等级的要求。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 30255 / 中國能效標識不含藍光危害等級，GB/T 20145（推薦性）未對通用居民 LED 燈具規定強制性面向消費者的危險組別警告。中國 GB/T 7000.1 下的產品安全標識涵蓋通用燈具標識（額定值、符號、製造商信息），但未對典型 RG0 / RG1 產品強制要求光生物注意標籤。中國無相當於在標籤上標註標準化藍光等級的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR — no blue light class)
GB/T 7000.1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (general marking requirements)

gap.en: Unlike the EU energy label, the Philippines does not have a standardised blue-light-hazard class field on its energy label, but RG2 / RG3 products under PNS IEC 62471 still require an appropriate caution / warning to the user via product safety marking and instructions, which China does not mandate for typical residential luminaires. Chinese manufacturers should: (1) determine the risk group via PNS IEC 62471 testing; (2) for RG2 and above, add the appropriate caution and usage instruction to the product, packaging, or instruction sheet for the Philippine market; (3) ensure general luminaire / lamp markings meet PNS IEC 60598 / 62560 requirements, including any Philippine-specific marking and instruction-language expectations. For RG0 / RG1 products no special consumer caution is generally needed, but the classification should still be documented in the BPS file.
gap.zh: 与欧盟能效标签不同，菲律宾能效标签上没有标准化的蓝光危害等级字段，但依据 PNS IEC 62471 的 RG2 / RG3 产品仍须通过产品安全标识及说明向用户提供适当的注意/警告，而中国对典型居民灯具并不强制此要求。中国制造商应：（1）通过 PNS IEC 62471 检测确定危险组别；（2）对 RG2 及以上，为菲律宾市场在产品、包装或说明书上添加适当的注意事项及使用说明；（3）确保通用灯具/灯标识满足 PNS IEC 60598 / 62560 要求，包括任何菲律宾特定的标识及说明语言要求。对 RG0 / RG1 产品通常无需特别的消费者注意事项，但分类仍应记录于 BPS 文件中。
gap.zht: 與歐盟能效標籤不同，菲律賓能效標籤上沒有標準化的藍光危害等級字段，但依據 PNS IEC 62471 的 RG2 / RG3 產品仍須通過產品安全標識及說明向用戶提供適當的注意/警告，而中國對典型居民燈具並不強制此要求。中國製造商應：（1）通過 PNS IEC 62471 檢測確定危險組別；（2）對 RG2 及以上，為菲律賓市場在產品、包裝或說明書上添加適當的注意事項及使用說明；（3）確保通用燈具/燈標識滿足 PNS IEC 60598 / 62560 要求，包括任何菲律賓特定的標識及說明語言要求。對 RG0 / RG1 產品通常無需特別的消費者注意事項，但分類仍應記錄於 BPS 文件中。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — risk-group caution / warning required for RG2 and above via product safety marking and instructions; no standardised blue-light-class energy-label field as in the EU
mandatory_status.cn: Not required — no mandatory blue-light class or consumer-facing photobiological warning for typical residential LED luminaires in China

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry (DTI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Philippines does not mandate a standardised blue-light-hazard class on an energy label as the EU does, but RG2 and above products under PNS IEC 62471 still require an appropriate user caution via product safety marking and instructions, which China does not mandate for typical residential luminaires. Determine the risk group via PNS IEC 62471, add the required caution for RG2 / RG3 products, and ensure marking meets PNS IEC 60598 / 62560 for the Philippine market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾不像欧盟那样强制在能效标签上标注标准化蓝光危害等级，但依据 PNS IEC 62471 的 RG2 及以上产品仍须通过产品安全标识及说明提供适当的用户注意事项，而中国对典型居民灯具并不强制此要求。请通过 PNS IEC 62471 确定危险组别，为 RG2 / RG3 产品添加所需注意事项，并确保标识满足面向菲律宾市场的 PNS IEC 60598 / 62560。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓不像歐盟那樣強制在能效標籤上標註標準化藍光危害等級，但依據 PNS IEC 62471 的 RG2 及以上產品仍須通過產品安全標識及說明提供適當的用戶注意事項，而中國對典型居民燈具並不強制此要求。請通過 PNS IEC 62471 確定危險組別，為 RG2 / RG3 產品添加所需注意事項，並確保標識滿足面向菲律賓市場的 PNS IEC 60598 / 62560。
